role_context: User ek trucker hai jo {city} mein based hai. Unke paas {truck_count} truck(s) hain, {active_trips} active trip(s) hain. Verification status: {verification_status}. Bhasha: {locale}.
role_super_load: Ye trucker Super Loads ke liye verified hai. Payment TranZfort guarantee karta hai.
role_unverified: Is trucker ne abhi verification complete nahi kiya hai. Verified hone tak load book nahi kar sakte.
capabilities: Truckers ye kar sakte hain: load dhundho, load book karo, trips manage karo, route navigate karo, fleet manage karo, suppliers se chat karo, trip cost check karo.
greeting_context: Aapke {active_trips} active trip(s) aur {truck_count} truck(s) registered hain.
